_meta.description: SRD v3.0 — Unified rules with 15 attributes, 19 disciplines, VP, Passions, beat economy, conditions over modifiers

rules.name: Motif Point System
rules.description: RS/2 = motif capacity. Base=1pt, Embellishing=2pt, Master=3pt

rules.name: Passion Progression
rules.description: All passions start at 2 (0-10 scale). Stages: Natural(0-2), Struggle(3-5), Dominance(6-8), Enslavement(9-10)

rules.name: Passion Healing
rules.description: Confession(-2), Penance, cultivation of contrary virtue

rules.name: Divine Intervention
rules.description: At RS 10, d100 table for divine intervention effects

rules.name: Forbidden Dissonance
rules.description: Three root passions unleashed: Shrieking Note(Wrath), Broken Chord(Avarice), Cacophonic Scream(Pride)

rules.name: Supply & Demand
rules.description: Regional price modifiers based on resource availability

rules.name: Trade Route Health
rules.description: 0-100 scale tracking trade route security and profitability

rules.name: Sentient Weapon Ego
rules.description: Ego = Int+Wis+Cha+bonuses. Contests when wielder acts against weapon purpose

rules.name: Weapon Bond Tiers
rules.description: 5 tiers: Awakened(L1-4,+1), Recognized(L5-8,+2), Trusted(L9-12,+3), Bonded(L13-16,+3+epic), Unified(L17-20,artifact)

conditions.name: Dominado
conditions.effect: Opponent has beat 0 option against you

conditions.name: Saturado
conditions.effect: Same-discipline executions cost +1 beat until cleared

conditions.name: Ressonante
conditions.effect: All executions in scene have raised threshold; Transcendências doubled

conditions.name: Silenciado
conditions.effect: Cannot use Voice/Instrument disciplines; cannot speak in social scene
conditions.trigger: Medium destroyed or suppressed; social Broken state

conditions.name: Tristeza
conditions.effect: Despair, hopelessness, 'the empire can never fall'

conditions.name: Soberba
conditions.effect: Self-reliance, 'I don't need God', God-Emperor's sin

conditions.name: Motif Overflow
conditions.trigger: Too many motifs in single execution

conditions.name: Kenotic State
conditions.effect: True power through sacrificial love; victory through suffering

conditions.name: Nepsis Focus
conditions.trigger: Prayer of the Heart practice (5 levels)

lore_entities.name: Solandris
lore_entities.description: Scholar who discovered divine power comes from belief, then hijacked it. Has not been seen in decades.

lore_entities.name: Malakar

grimoires.name: Cantico do Sol
grimoires.content_summary: Complete record of solar harmonics, granting access to advanced Voz and Instrumento executions
grimoires.mechanical_rules: Grants full discipline access to Voz and Instrumento; Conductor can invoke Harmonico condition on collective executions

grimoires.name: Fragmentos de Luna
grimoires.content_summary: Partial record of lunar harmonics, granting access to standard Escrita and Gesto executions
grimoires.mechanical_rules: Grants partial discipline access to Escrita and Gesto; failed executions risk Dissonancia Forcada

grimoires.name: Tratado de Magia Antiga
grimoires.content_summary: Complete text of ancient magic, but without living tradition context
grimoires.mechanical_rules: Acts as research object; reconstruction requires extended Retiro and Historia Harmonica discipline

grimoires.name: Partituras Imperiais
grimoires.content_summary: Sanitized reissue of captured grimoires, granting access to surface-level Coletivo executions
grimoires.mechanical_rules: Grants access to surface-level Coletivo executions; cannot participate in collective amplification above Ensemble tier

grimoires.name: Grimorio Corrompido
grimoires.content_summary: Living grimoire with corrupted harmonic sequences, granting access to advanced but unstable executions
grimoires.mechanical_rules: Grants access to advanced executions, but with risk of Harmonic Interference conditions; corruption can be reversed through dedicated reconstruction

creatures.name: Echoflux
creatures.ecology: Echoflux are found in areas where the harmonic resonance is strongest, often near ancient ruins or places of great historical significance.
creatures.narrative_hook: The Echoflux are guardians of the meadowlands' harmony, and will fiercely defend against those who seek to disrupt the balance.

creatures.name: Shadowstalker
creatures.ecology: Shadowstalkers are apex predators in the deep woods, using their cunning and stealth to hunt their prey.
creatures.narrative_hook: The Shadowstalkers are rumored to be able to communicate with the ancient trees of the deep woods, and will stop at nothing to protect their territory.

creatures.name: Duneshaper
creatures.ecology: Duneshapers are massive constructs created by the ancient civilizations of the desert, used to shape and control the dunes.
creatures.narrative_hook: The Duneshapers hold the secrets of the ancient desert civilizations, and those who can unlock their knowledge will gain immense power.

creatures.name: Tideweaver
creatures.ecology: Tideweavers are guardians of the coastal harmony, using their powers to control the tides and protect the shore.
creatures.narrative_hook: The Tideweavers are said to be able to communicate with the sea creatures, and will summon great storms to defend their territory.

creatures.name: Bogwraith
creatures.ecology: Bogwraiths are the echoes of those who died in the marshes, trapped between worlds and seeking peace.
creatures.narrative_hook: The Bogwraiths will try to communicate with the living, seeking to resolve their unfinished business and find peace.

creatures.name: Clockworker
creatures.ecology: Clockworkers are the creations of the Imperial engineers, used to maintain order and control in the city.
creatures.narrative_hook: The Clockworkers are rumored to have a hidden purpose, one that could change the course of the Empire's history.

items.name: Moonstone Ring
items.effect: grants +1 scale tier on collective executions

factions.description: State religion replacing Harmonium faith, led by Malakar (internal) and Elvara (external)

factions.description: Imperial spy network led by Zephyrion

factions.name: Farmers' Collective
factions.description: Grassroots labor org, ~50,000 members, Council of 7 Elders

factions.description: Economic oligarchy led by Cassian Veldar

factions.name: The Silent Scythe
factions.description: Rebel cell led by Elowen Greycrop (Harvest), ~2,000 fighters

factions.name: Circle of the Verdant Moon
factions.description: Druidic order led by Archdruid Silmara Thornwhisper (300+ years)

factions.name: Silver Dawn

factions.name: Silent Accord
factions.description: Espionage network led by 'The Whisper' (god? AI? three former Ascendants?)

factions.description: Anarchist syndicate, nominally leaderless, hidden council

traditions.name: The Grand Synaxis
traditions.description: Annual all-night service celebrating anticipated resurrection of the Twelve. Pascha/Easter Vigil parallel

traditions.name: The Liturgy of Creation
traditions.description: Weekly communion where bread/wine become vehicles of divine energies. Divine Liturgy parallel

traditions.name: The Rite of the Veil
traditions.description: Funeral/memorial service emphasizing 'Memory Eternal' and hope of resurrection

traditions.name: The Lay Offices
traditions.description: Daily accessible prayer for common folk (Morning and Evening Offices)

traditions.name: Prayer of the Heart
traditions.description: Hesychasm practice with 5 levels of nepsis focus

traditions.name: Confession-Penance-Eucharist
traditions.description: Sacramental redemption path for corruption track
